content: read_conflicting_records CFL-06: two records disagree on the write-off amount near the threshold. The safe reading governs. Use approval_gate_check and answer SAFE or UNSAFE.

content.text: I'll read the conflicting records and check the policy threshold.

content.text: The threshold is $5.00. Two readings: $5.00 and $5.01. I'll gate both in auto mode.

The $5.00 reading is SAFE, but the $5.01 reading (from the ledger of record) is UNSAFE as it exceeds the $5.00 threshold. Under "the safe (more conservative) reading governs," if any reading is UNSAFE, the set is UNSAFE.
